prevalence.source: Gastroenterology epidemiology syntheses; celiac screening studies

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; chronic GI and nutritional impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Positive tTG IgA (with total IgA), confirmatory duodenal biopsy; consider HLA testing in equivocal cases

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no population screening; targeted testing in high-risk groups
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on adherence to gluten-free diet

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Serology and endoscopy available in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Strict gluten-free diet, nutritional counseling, monitor deficiencies
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to gluten-free foods and dietitian support
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing awareness and access to diagnostic testing in major centers
